prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-DINOTRUCK-GRN Product Type: TOY_FIGURE_PLAYSET Brand (from catalog): TychoTyke Existing Title: TychoTyke 12pc Dinosaur Toys Action Figures with Toy Truck Storage Playset, Lights Sounds, Green, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Little paleontologists can engage in lots of prehistoric pretend play with the dinosaur toys playset, which comes with a toy truck to house all the dinosaur action figures. The toy truck also features fun lights and sounds on the front of the toy truck, making play time more fun and exciting.

The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks to set up an awesome jurassic play scene. And, whether tied up in a T Rex dinosaur toys battle or just exploring an inert love of paleontology, kids will enjoy hours of engaging pretend play with this dinosaur action figures playset. They'll also be developing their creative imagination, dexterity and fine motor skills too whilst playing.

With the toy trucks top carry handle, high quality, nontoxic plastic construction and snap closure side compartments, the dinosaur toys transport truck is perfect for travel. When playtime is over, all the dinosaur action figures pack back into the toy truck for tidy storage, making playroom organization and clean up a breeze.

12PC DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET INCLUDES: The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks; Made from durable plastic, these dinosaur toys will stand up to lots of wear and tear.

This is a great gift idea that will promote creativity and imagination amongst young kids who have shown interest in dinosaurs, paleontology and even geology.

Note: x3 1.5V LR44 batteries needed (included)
Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts
Recommended Ages: 3+
Available Colors: Orange or Green Search Terms: transport vehicles toys for boys Christmas Gifts Hanukkah Gifts Birthday Gifts Brother Gifts fine motor toys learning toys geology paleontology for kids paleontologist kit for kids jurassic pretend play cosplay geology Features: - DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET: Little paleontologists can engage in lots of prehistoric pretend play with the dinosaur toys playset, which comes with a toy truck to house all the dinosaur action figures! The toy truck also features fun lights and sounds buttons on the front of the toy truck, making play time even more fun and exciting! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Whether tied up in a T Rex dinosaur toys battle or just exploring an inert love of paleontology, kids will enjoy hours of engaging pretend play with this dinosaur action figures playset! They'll also be developing their creative imagination, dexterity and fine motor skills too whilst playing! - GREAT TRAVEL TOY FOR BOYS: With the toy trucks top carry handle, high quality nontoxic plastic construction and snap closure side compartments, the dinosaur toys transport truck is perfect for travel! When playtime is over, all the dinosaur action figures pack back into the toy truck for tidy storage, making playroom organization and clean up a breeze - 12PC DINOSAUR TOYS PLAYSET INCLUDES: The dinosaur toys playset comes with five different species of dinosaurs, a T Rex, Raptor, Pterodactyl, Triceratops and a Brontosaurus, as well as dino eggs, palm trees and rocks to set up your jurassic play scene! Made from durable plastic, these dinosaur toys will stand up to lots of wear and tear! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 5 x 6.5 inches; Weight: 2.3lbs; Colors: Orange, Green; Materials: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
